error:
[externalize] lovable-assets create failade (exit 1): Error: unsupported file extension: .mhtml
Usage:
  lovable-assets create --file <path> [flags]

Flags:
      --asset-id string        Asset UUID (generated by default)
      --bucket string          R2 bucket name (defaults to env)
      --cache-control string   Cache-Control metadata
      --content-type string    Content-Type metadata (inferred by default)
      --endpoint-url string    R2 S3 endpoint URL (defaults to env)
  -f, --file string            Local file path to upload
      --filename string        Filename to use in the CDN URL (defaults to basename of --file)
  -h, --help                   help for create
      --project-id string      Project ID (defaults to env)
      --region string          S3 region (defaults to LOVABLE_ASSETS_AWS_REGION, LOVABLE_ASSETS_AWS_DEFAULT_REGION, AWS_REGION, AWS_DEFAULT_REGION, or auto)
